creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear maintainer of FreeBSD port net-mgmt/netams, can you please take a
look at

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=141356

and follow up with your comments?

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>
Maybe I should go ask that elvish wizard standing over there (YES A REAL
ELF IS STANDING IN MY ROOM!), he should be able to tell me.
